name: Teatest Coverage for TUI Components
description: Add comprehensive teatest-based tests to verify TUI components render correctly and handle user interactions properly. Tests focus on View() newline endings (for proper terminal rendering) and interactive behavior.

userStories.title: Wizard multi-step navigation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for Wizard navigation so that step forward/backward behavior is verified in a real program context.
acceptanceCriteria: Test Enter key advances to next step
Test Esc key goes back to previous step
Test Ctrl+C cancels wizard and sets IsCancelled()
Test wizard state updates correctly between steps
Test View() delegates to current field's View()

userStories.title: Wizard skip logic
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for Wizard skip logic so that conditional step skipping works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test steps with Skip func returning true are skipped on forward navigation
Test steps with Skip func returning false are shown
Test skipped steps are also skipped on backward navigation
Test skip logic re-evaluates based on current workflow state

userStories.title: Wizard completion flow
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for Wizard completion so that WorkflowCompleteMsg is sent correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test WorkflowCompleteMsg sent after last step Enter
Test IsComplete() returns true after completion
Test all field values are stored in workflow state
Test wizard handles empty steps list gracefully

userStories.title: Wizard back boundary handling
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for back boundary so that BackBoundaryMsg is sent when pressing Esc at step 0.
acceptanceCriteria: Test BackBoundaryMsg sent when Esc pressed at step 0
Test wizard remains at step 0 after BackBoundaryMsg
Test current field remains focused after BackBoundaryMsg

userStories.title: Wizard window resize propagation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for window resize so that size changes propagate to current field.
acceptanceCriteria: Test WindowSizeMsg updates wizard context width/height
Test current field receives WithWidth/WithHeight calls
Test field re-renders with new dimensions

userStories.title: Navigator stack push/pop
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for Navigator push/pop operations so that screen navigation works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test Push() adds model to stack
Test Pop() removes and returns top model
Test Depth() reflects current stack size
Test Current() returns top model
Test empty stack returns nil from Current()

userStories.title: Navigator message-based navigation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for NavigateMsg so that screen transitions via messages work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test NavigateMsg pushes target model onto stack
Test target model's Init() is called after push
Test View() delegates to newly pushed model
Test Update() delegates to current model

userStories.title: Filterable Enter selection
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for Filterable Enter key so that option selection works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test Enter selects currently highlighted option
Test selected value is stored in field
Test NextStepMsg is sent after selection
Test IsComplete() returns true after selection

userStories.title: Filterable custom value entry
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for Filterable custom value entry so that non-matching input can be submitted.
acceptanceCriteria: Test typing non-matching text shows 'No matches' message
Test Enter with no matches uses text input as custom value
Test custom value is trimmed before storing
Test empty input is handled gracefully

userStories.title: Filterable arrow key navigation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for Filterable arrow navigation so that option list scrolling works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test Up arrow moves cursor up
Test Down arrow moves cursor down
Test cursor wraps from top to bottom
Test cursor wraps from bottom to top
Test viewport scrolls when cursor moves out of view

userStories.title: Selector Enter selection
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for Selector Enter key so that option selection works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test Enter selects currently highlighted option
Test selected value matches option's Value field
Test NextStepMsg is sent after selection
Test IsComplete() returns true after selection

userStories.title: Selector vim key navigation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for Selector j/k vim keys so that alternative navigation works.
acceptanceCriteria: Test j key moves cursor down
Test k key moves cursor up
Test Ctrl+j moves cursor down
Test Ctrl+k moves cursor up

userStories.title: TextInput typing and submission
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for TextInput typing so that text entry and submission work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test typing characters updates input value
Test Enter submits current value
Test submitted value is trimmed
Test NextStepMsg is sent after submission
Test IsComplete() returns true after submission

userStories.title: TextInput validation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for TextInput validation so that invalid input is rejected.
acceptanceCriteria: Test validator function is called on Enter
Test validation error prevents submission
Test error message is displayed in View()
Test error clears when user types
Test valid input after error succeeds

userStories.title: TextInput default value
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for TextInput default values so that pre-populated values work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test WithDefault() sets initial value on Focus()
Test cursor is positioned at end of default value
Test default value can be edited
Test empty default value is handled

userStories.title: Confirm y/n shortcut keys
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for Confirm y/n shortcuts so that quick responses work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test y key immediately confirms with true
Test Y key immediately confirms with true
Test n key immediately cancels with false
Test N key immediately cancels with false
Test CancelMsg is sent on n/N

userStories.title: Confirm Enter submission
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for Confirm Enter key so that button selection works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test Enter with Yes selected sends NextStepMsg
Test Enter with No selected sends CancelMsg
Test GetValue() returns correct boolean
Test IsCancelled() reflects No selection

userStories.title: Confirm left/right navigation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for Confirm arrow keys so that button navigation works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test left arrow selects Yes
Test right arrow selects No
Test h key selects Yes (vim-style)
Test l key selects No (vim-style)

userStories.title: Table row navigation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for Table navigation so that row selection works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test Up/Down arrows move cursor
Test Cursor() returns correct row index
Test SelectedRow() returns correct row data
Test SetCursor() programmatically sets position

userStories.title: Table async cell rendering
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for Table async cells so that loading states render correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test spinner shows while cell is loading
Test value displays after cell loads
Test IsLoading() returns correct state
Test multiple async cells in same row work

userStories.title: SelectWorkflowType selection
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for workflow type selector so that workflow choice works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test all 4 workflow types are displayed (Feature, Bug, Hotfix, Merge)
Test arrow navigation between options
Test Enter selects workflow type
Test GetValue() returns correct workflow type string

userStories.title: FeatureWorkflow end-to-end
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for complete FeatureWorkflow so that the full wizard flow works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test step 1: JIRA issue/custom name selection
Test step 2: Branch name input with auto-generated default
Test step 3: Base branch selection (or skip if branch exists)
Test step 4: Confirm step shows correct summary
Test final state contains all expected values
userStories.completionNotes: Completed - see pkg/tui/workflows/workflows_teatest_test.go. Fixed test model to process CancelMsg through wizard before quitting.

userStories.title: HotfixWorkflow end-to-end
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for complete HotfixWorkflow so that the full wizard flow works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test step 1: JIRA issue/custom name selection
Test step 2: Base branch selection (mandatory, not skipped)
Test step 3: Branch name input with hotfix/ prefix
Test step 4: Confirm step shows correct summary
Test worktree name gets HOTFIX_ prefix

userStories.title: MergeWorkflow end-to-end
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage for complete MergeWorkflow so that the full wizard flow works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test step 1: Source branch selection
Test step 2: Target branch selection
Test step 3: Confirm step shows merge details
Test auto-generated worktree name (MERGE_{source}-to-{target})
Test auto-generated branch name (merge/{source}-to-{target})

userStories.title: View() newline consistency verification
userStories.description: As a developer, I want teatest coverage ensuring all View() methods end with newline for proper terminal rendering.
acceptanceCriteria: Test Filterable View() ends with newline in all states
Test Selector View() ends with newline in all states
Test TextInput View() ends with newline in all states
Test Confirm View() ends with newline in all states
Test Table View() ends with newline
